content: Self-Refine's single-model iterative self-feedback loop can be augmented by LLM self-reflection mechanisms' focus on multiple inconsistent solving perspectives, creating a hierarchical self-reflection framework that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of no additional training or supervised data while resolving its limitation of getting stuck in local optima from single-perspective feedback. This framework lets an LLM first generate multiple divergent initial outputs via contrasting reflection perspectives, then iteratively refine each candidate and cross-evaluate across perspectives entirely through self-feedback with no external oversight.
